title: Onboarding - Organized - Allow "Poly Lens" to use your location window [Android]
scenario: Verify tapping "Enable now" on the Organized screen triggers a location permission dialog for Poly Lens with specific options and text, while the user remains on the Organized screen.
steps: 1. Navigate to the 'Organized' screen during the onboarding flow.
3. Observe the location permission dialog that appears for 'Poly Lens'.
4. Verify the dialog text reads: 'Allow Poly Lens to use your location - Poly Lens uses your location to find your device. See the Poly Privacy Policy in General Settings for more information.'
5. Verify the dialog offers the following options: 'Allow Once' (or 'Only This Time' on Android), 'Allow while using app', and 'Don't allow'.
6. Confirm that the 'Organized' screen remains visible in the background behind the dialog.
expected: Tapping 'Enable now' on the Organized screen triggers a location permission dialog for Poly Lens with the specified text and options (Allow Once/Only This Time, Allow while using app, Don't allow), while the Organized screen remains visible in the background.
